title: shah bid
description: A modpack with QoL improvements plus FPS improvements.
body:
This modpack aims to **improve many technical aspects** of Minecraft while still keeping it relatively vanilla. It has mods that can replace and excel past the capabilities of Optifine. This modpack has many mods that **improves your performance** while playing Minecraft. FPS using this modpack can double or more! There are also mods that reduces memory usage, improve chunk rendering speeds, and much more!

Unlike modpacks such as [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop) by [HyperSoop](https://modrinth.com/user/HyperSoop), this modpack also provides enhancements to **Minecraft's Quality Of Life**. It fixes random bugs and glitches that are present in vanilla, allows for better looking skins, faster beacon building, etc.

This modpack has a client-only version and a client + server version
(It is recommended to allocate at least 2 GB of RAM to this modpack)

All mods present in this modpack can be found in Modrinth.
